Industrial real estate investment and management —
warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities
Does the applicant store flammable liquids on premises?
Does the applicant have a burglar alarm system?
Does the applicant sell or distribute products manufactured by others?
Is the building located within a flood zone?
Are there any alterations or construction in progress?
Is the applicant the building owner or tenant?
Are there any exterior signs or awnings?
Are commercial cooking operations (deep fat fryers, char broilers, woks, or commercial kitchen hoods) used on premises?
Is the applicant the sole occupant of the building?
Are there any underground storage tanks on premises?
Are there any swimming pools or hot tubs on premises?
Damage to Premises Rented to You
250 Civic Center Drive, Suite 600, Columbus, OH, 43215

Any person who knowingly and with intent to defraud any insurance company or other person files an application for insurance or statement of claim containing any materially false information, or conceals for the purpose of misleading, information concerning any fact material thereto, commits a fraudulent insurance act, which is a crime and subjects such person to criminal and civil penalties.
